g.text: • Dynamic DNS: Each user gets *.userId.dock8s.in subdomain space

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: • Wildcard SSL: Single cert covers all user subdomains (DNS-01 challenge)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: • Zero Downtime: Traefik auto-reloads config files without restart

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
